description_long: This is a three-tiered industrial-style shelving unit with a rectangular frame and open sides. The shelves are made of wood or wood-like material with a weathered, grayish-brown finish, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The frame is constructed from black metal, with visible bolts at the corners, providing structural support and a modern, minimalist aesthetic. Each shelf is spacious and flat, suitable for storing or displaying a variety of items. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it practical for use in garages, workshops, or urban interiors. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, with no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments.
description: A three-tiered, open-shelved unit with a black metal frame and weathered wood shelves, designed for industrial or urban use. Its open sides and sturdy construction make it ideal for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three shelves and the open, rectangular frame with visible bolts at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open, unobstructed design of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the shelves and frame structure without any backing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the shelf depth and open frame, mirroring the other side.
